A

accept(LocationVisitor) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
Accepts a visitor.
accept(LocationVisitor) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
Accepts a visitor.
accept(LocationVisitor) - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Accepts a LocationVisitor, dispatching to the correct visit overload for this node type (double dispatch).
accept(LocationVisitor) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
Accepts a visitor.

addRoom(Room) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
 

B

Building - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model
Represents an entire building — the root of the location hierarchy.
Building() - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
 
Building(int, String) - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
 
BuildingInfoApplication - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.app
Entry point for the Building Info Spring Boot application.
BuildingInfoApplication() - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.app.BuildingInfoApplication
 
BuildingInfoController - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest
REST controller exposing the Building Info API.
BuildingInfoController() - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
 
BuildingInfoTransformer - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic
Core business logic service for the Building Info application.
BuildingInfoTransformer() - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
 

F

findLevel(Building, int) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
Finds a Level within a building by its id.
findRoom(Building, int) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
Finds a Room anywhere within a building by its id.

G

getArea() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
Returns the total floor area of the building in m², calculated as the sum of areas of all levels.
getArea() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
Returns the total floor area of this level in m², calculated as the sum of areas of all rooms on the level.
getArea() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Returns the total floor area of this location in m².
getArea() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
Returns the room's own floor area in m².
getArea(Location) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
Returns the total floor area of the given location in m².
getBuildingArea(Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the total floor area of the building in m².
getBuildingCube(Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the total volume (cubature) of the building in m³.
getBuildingHeatingPerCube(Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ for the building.
getBuildingLightPerArea(Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the average lighting power per m² for the building.
getCube() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
Returns the total volume of the building in m³, calculated as the sum of volumes of all levels.
getCube() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
Returns the total volume of this level in m³, calculated as the sum of volumes of all rooms on the level.
getCube() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Returns the total volume (cubature) of this location in m³.
getCube() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
Returns the room's own volume in m³.
getCube(Location) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
Returns the total volume (cubature) of the given location in m³.
getHeating() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
Returns the total heating energy consumption of the building, calculated as the sum across all levels.
getHeating() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
Returns the total heating energy consumption of this level, calculated as the sum of all rooms on the level.
getHeating() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Returns the total heating energy consumption of this location.
getHeating() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
Returns the room's heating energy consumption.
getHeatingPerCube() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ for the whole building.
getHeatingPerCube() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ for this level.
getHeatingPerCube() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ of volume.
getHeatingPerCube() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
Returns the heating energy consumption per unit volume for this room.
getHeatingPerCube(Location) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ of volume for the given location.
getId() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
 
getId() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
 
getId() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Returns the unique identifier of this location.
getId() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
 
getLevelArea(int, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the total floor area of a specific level in m².
getLevelCube(int, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the total volume of a specific level in m³.
getLevelHeatingPerCube(int, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the average heating per m³ for a specific level.
getLevelLightPerArea(int, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the average lighting power per m² for a specific level.
getLevels() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
 
getLight() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
Returns the total lighting power of the building in watts, calculated as the sum across all levels.
getLight() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
Returns the total lighting power of this level in watts, calculated as the sum of lighting power of all rooms on the level.
getLight() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Returns the total lighting power of this location in watts.
getLight() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
Returns the room's total lighting power in watts.
getLightPerArea() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
Returns the average lighting power per m² for the whole building.
getLightPerArea() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
Returns the average lighting power per m² for this level.
getLightPerArea() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Returns the average lighting power per m² of floor area.
getLightPerArea() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
Returns the lighting power per unit area for this room.
getLightPerArea(Location) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
Returns the average lighting power per m² of floor area for the given location.
getName() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
 
getName() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
 
getName() - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Location
Returns the optional name of this location, or null if not set.
getName() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
 
getResult() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.visitor.HeatingThresholdVisitor
Returns an unmodifiable view of the rooms collected during traversal.
getRoomArea(int, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the floor area of a specific room in m².
getRoomCube(int, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the volume of a specific room in m³.
getRoomHeatingPerCube(int, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the heating per m³ for a specific room.
getRoomLightPerArea(int, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns the lighting power per m² for a specific room.
getRooms() - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
 
getRoomsExceedingHeating(double, Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.rest.BuildingInfoController
Returns all rooms whose heating per m³ exceeds the given threshold.
getRoomsExceedingHeatingThreshold(Building, double) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
Returns all rooms within a building whose heating energy consumption per m³ exceeds the given threshold.

H

HeatingThresholdVisitor - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.visitor
A LocationVisitor that collects every Room whose heating energy consumption per m³ exceeds a configurable threshold.
HeatingThresholdVisitor(double) - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.visitor.HeatingThresholdVisitor
Creates a new visitor with the given heating threshold.

L

Level - Class in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model
Represents a single floor (level) within a Building.
Level() - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
 
Level(int, String) - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
 
Location - Interface in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model
Represents any location in the building hierarchy: a Building, a Level, or a Room.
LocationVisitor - Interface in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model
Visitor interface for the Location composite hierarchy.

Represents a single room within a Level.

setLevels(List<Level>) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Building
 
setLight(double) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room

setName(String) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Room
 
setRooms(List<Room>) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.Level
 

V

visit(Building) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.visitor.HeatingThresholdVisitor
No-op: building-level data is derived from rooms, which are handled individually in HeatingThresholdVisitor.visit(Room).
visit(Building) - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.LocationVisitor
Called when visiting a Building node (after all its levels and their rooms have already been visited).
visit(Level) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.visitor.HeatingThresholdVisitor
No-op: level-level data is derived from rooms, which are handled individually in HeatingThresholdVisitor.visit(Room).
visit(Level) - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.LocationVisitor
Called when visiting a Level node (after all its rooms have already been visited).
visit(Room) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.visitor.HeatingThresholdVisitor
Checks whether this room's heating per m³ exceeds the threshold and, if so, adds it to the result list.
visit(Room) - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.model.LocationVisitor
Called when visiting a Room leaf node.
